description.p: Firefox is a powerful, extensible web browser with support for modern web standards. It offers a fast, secure browsing experience with extensive privacy features and customization options.

ul.li: Enhanced Tracking Protection blocks thousands of trackers by default
Private Browsing mode with built-in Tracking Protection
Picture-in-Picture mode for multitasking with videos
Integrated password manager and form autofill
Tab management with containers for separating browsing contexts
Firefox Sync for seamless browsing across devices
Support for modern web standards (HTML5, CSS3, WebGL)

description.p: Firefox is developed by Mozilla, a non-profit organization dedicated to keeping the internet open and accessible to all.
Latest stable release of Firefox with security updates and bug fixes.
